bio: Apex Capital | Global Macro & Fixed Income | $4.2B AUM | Navigating volatility since 2003. Views are our own.
pinned_content: Our Q4 2024 outlook: Central bank divergence creates generational opportunities in EM debt. Thread below on why we're overweight Brazilian and Indian government bonds.
follower_persona: Institutional allocators, family offices, fixed income portfolio managers, and macro-focused traders seeking sophisticated market commentary
posting_style: Measured, data-heavy, contrarian. Heavy use of charts and yield curve analysis. Rarely comments on equities. Formal institutional tone.
key_narratives: Central bank policy divergence as alpha generator
Structural shift in global bond markets post-2022
EM sovereign debt as the next frontier
Inflation persistence and real rate dynamics
credibility_markers: CIO quoted in Financial Times and Bloomberg
Annual Sharpe ratio of 1.8 over last decade
